commit_title: Make X-axis optional; default to Row Number
commit_message: Allow plots to work without an explicit x-axis by treating row indices as the default X values. Update data mapping so x values use the selected column when present or the row number otherwise, and adapt trace generation, histogram handling, axis titles, and the generated receipt to reflect 'Row Number' when no xAxis is set. Change TopMenuBar to avoid auto-selecting the first column (set xAxis to '' on column updates). Add a UI hint in AxisSideMenu that indicates the default is Row Number and that dragging a column will override it.
